sizing_rule.note: Divide total capital into equal units (3 units). Each position allocated max 1/3 (33.3%) of total capital. Ensures proportional exposure across up to 3 concurrent positions. Equivalent to fixed fractional sizing at 33.3% per position.

source_rule_text: Divide total capital into equal units and size each position so that no single investment exceeds the capacity of one unit, ensuring proportional exposure across the portfolio.
